    ConsulFilesPropertySource.init(GetValue value)

    Method parameters in org.springframework.cloud.consul.config with type arguments of type GetValue
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    ConsulPropertySource.parsePropertiesInKeyValueFormat(List<GetValue> values)
    Parses the properties in key value style i.e., values are expected to be either a sub key or a constant.
    protected void
    ConsulPropertySource.parsePropertiesWithNonKeyValueFormat(List<GetValue> values, ConsulConfigProperties.Format format)
    Parses the properties using the format which is not a key value style i.e., either java properties style or YAML style.
